highlights: Handbook Ch 18.5 + §6.16 adopted before any schema code (63b0849)
3 P1 review findings fixed: ambiguous-failure claim release, write-behind audit, untransmitted idempotency key (0fe0d7e)
learnings: Invariants were enforced at the happy path; tests pinned the statement, not the failure mode. Fresh-context adversarial review caught what structured review missed.
Write failure-mode tests first for safety-bearing code: timeout-after-send, crash-between-steps, replay serialization.
Tracked debt: Vercel 'staging' deploy actually targets preview env; pre-commit validates worktree not index; step.run JSON-serialization is a doc-comment constraint, not a type constraint.
next: Build 1 — data & memory substrate (packages/db, reversible migrations, RLS per §18.5.4, pgvector), then Build 2 — orchestration.
